name: Mohawk Mark || Invincible
description:
Broken- Seether

“I wanted you to know, I love the way you laugh. I wanna hold you high and steal your pain away.”

You’re not the happiest individuals but Mark sometimes appreciates the good moments.

A/N: 17/36 aw yeahhh fell asleep a lot typing this

Opening text 🎸-

Mark and you weren’t really a likely pair but maybe two wrongs do make a right. You both were negative for your own reasons but even then you guys had some good moments and right now was one of them. Sitting on a roof top eating mediocre burgers like everything was normal. Mark grabbed a ketchup packet and tossed it at an unsuspecting teenager.

You know you shouldn’t have laughed but you did, it was brighter than the giant ball of light rising behind the two of you. Your laugh spread to him making him smile and reluctantly laughing. The two of you throw ketchup packets at people like asshole birds shitting on people’s heads. Once you ran out he glances at you.

“I love how you laugh. Wish it was something people experienced more, I’d take all the pain if I could I swear.” He says more loving than he meant to let on.

He smiles at you before finding another packet and tossing it like the asshole you’ve grown with. His cynical cackle filling your area.
creator: SlugLoveBug
